text:
Swap Ticket 影武者切符 - is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

|align=center colspan="3"|Rip the ticket and give it to someone you want to switch with, and you can live his/her life for 24 hours. Book of 1,000.

Summary

Swap Ticket 影武者切符 - This card allows the caster to summon forth a book of Swap Tickets. This allows the user to literally swap bodies 24 hours. To use, simply rip a ticket in half, and give it to someone else. You will then live as this person for a day. The book contains 1,000 tickets.

Card Description

{| border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE"
![Jap]
|No.092 :: 影武者切符 
この切符を切って代わりたい人に渡すと、24時間その人の代わりを務めることができる。1000枚入り。
|-
![Eng]
|No.092 :: Swap Ticket 
If you rip this ticket in half and pass half to a person, you will swap bodies and live as that person for 24 hours. 1000 pieces.
|}
